name: 𝐊𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐎𝐭𝐨𝐧𝐨𝐤𝐨𝐣𝐢 - ＳＤＲＡ２- 𝕌𝕝𝕥𝕚𝕞𝕒𝕥𝕖 𝔾𝕦𝕚𝕥𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕤𝕥
description:
Kanade Otonokoji (오토노코지 카나데) is a character featured in the Korean fangame Super Danganronpa Another 2 created by LINUJ.

She is one of the two members in the band "Melody Rhythm" as the Super High School Level Guitarist (카나데 초고교급 기타리스트), alongside her older twin sister Hibiki Otonokoji as the Super High School Level Vocalist.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
creator: Bruh004
